meta.title: Admissions | Al-Hayaat School
meta.description: Join Al-Hayaat School for 2026–2027. Learn about our admissions process, requirements, and fee structure.

hero.headline: Admission
hero.subtext: A faith-based educational journey for your child.

banner.alt: Pattern of colorful geometric shapes including green pinwheels, teal and black checkered squares, purple circles, and yellow and black diagonal stripes.

enrollment.heading: Building a Bright Future – Enroll for 2026–2027!

cards.title: JK to Grade 3
cards.body: For our opening year, Al-Hayaat School will offer Junior Kindergarten (JK) through Grade 3. This is our planned default program—families can register knowing these grades will run as part of our September 2026 launch.

cards.title: Grades 4 to 6
cards.body: Grades 4, 5, and 6 are not offered by default for the opening year. They will open only if enough families register interest and enrollment targets are met. We will confirm whether these grades run as we assess registrations; please reach out if you are considering one of these grades so we can plan together with the community.

cards.title: Academic Excellence
cards.description: Integrating Canadian, UK, and US standards

cards.title: Faith-Based Education
cards.description: Rooted in the teachings of Quran and Ahlulbayt (a.s.)

how_to_apply.heading: How to Apply
how_to_apply.intro: The registration process involves submission of required documents, a student assessment, and payment of registration and resource fees, as outlined below:
steps: Download the registration forms, sign, and email the forms and documents to admin@alhayaat.ca. The required forms and documents are listed below.
Pay the registration fee. The fee can be paid online through e-transfer to finance@alhayaat.ca or via cheque payable to Al-Hayaat School.
The school administration will contact you to arrange a student assessment.
After the assessment, the school will confirm the enrolment.
Once confirmed, parents are required to pay the resource fee to finalize and complete the student registration and enrolment process.

requirements.heading: Required items for registration
requirements.intro: Use the downloads below for each form. Complete and sign them, gather the required documents, and email everything to admin@alhayaat.ca. (Online submission is not available yet—we will announce it when the enrollment form is ready.)

fees.heading: Fees
items: Registration fee (payable with the registration forms)
Resource fee (payable after the student assessment)

documents: Copy of last year's final report card or current year's last report card (if applicable)
Copy of child's birth certificate, PR card, or passport

items.note: 5% discount if paid in full upfront
5% discount on second and subsequent children

cta.heading: Join Our Community
cta.body: Together, we're building a brighter future for our children and the community.
